_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Tigers look to keep their flickering wild-card pulse alive as they open a pivotal series against a Rays squad desperate to play spoiler. With Detroit’s postseason window narrowing by the day, every pitch at the Trop carries must-win weight.

The Marlins and Nationals collide in a battle of cellar-dwellers looking to salvage pride and audition for future roles as the season winds down. With both clubs firmly out of the postseason hunt, tonight’s matchup is a gritty test of organizational depth and individual resolve.

The Royals look to tighten their grip on an AL Wild Card spot as they open a pivotal series against a Reds team desperate to play spoiler at Great American Ball Park. With Kansas City fighting for postseason positioning, every game against a National League underdog is a must-win mandate.

The White Sox look to salvage some pride in a lost season as they visit a Twins squad desperate to tighten their grip on the final AL Wild Card spot. With Minnesota’s postseason life hanging in the balance, they cannot afford a stumble against the league’s cellar-dwellers.

The Giants arrive in Milwaukee desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes, but they’ll have to solve a Brewers squad looking to tighten their grip on a top-two seed in the National League. With the Wild Card race reaching a fever pitch, every pitch tonight carries the weight of San Francisco's flickering October dreams.

The Rangers roll into St. Louis desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes, while the Cardinals look to protect a precarious lead in a crowded Wild Card race. With both clubs fighting for survival, tonight’s series opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two teams clinging to the edge of October contention.

The Rockies head to Anaheim looking to salvage momentum against an Angels squad desperate to prove their recent offensive spark isn't just a mid-summer mirage. With both teams languishing at the bottom of the standings, tonight is a gritty audition for fringe roster players fighting to secure their future in the majors.

The Dodgers look to tighten their grip on the NL West as they clash with a Diamondbacks squad desperate to maintain their momentum in a crowded Wild Card race. With postseason positioning on the line, every pitch in this desert showdown carries massive weight for both clubs.

The Mets roll into Seattle desperate to keep their Wild Card pulse beating against a Mariners rotation that remains the ultimate roadblock for any postseason contender. With both clubs fighting for their October lives, this series opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two offenses struggling to find consistency.
